---
title: 'Motor traffic and the pollution of the air: 100 years on'
date: '2007-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- R.M. Harrison
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Lancet*'
---

## Motor traffic and the pollution of the air: 100 years on

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, R.M. Harrison</p>

_*Lancet*_, 2007


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2007-e.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
